item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters KIT GERMANTOWN CABG DYNJ905855 KIT UNIVERSITY CABG PACK DYNJ905857 OH MED R Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters KIT GERMANTOWN CABG DYNJ905855 KIT UNIVERSITY CABG PACK DYNJ905857 OH MED R
item.summary: Kits contain Swan-Ganz catheters recalled by Becton Dickinson (BD). BD has received complaints of leaks/breakage involving failures of the (blue) proximal injectate lumen hub on these catheters. This has led to instances of leakage, lumen damage, and breakage, and may lead to infection, medication loss, and/or blood loss. Product details: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters KIT GERMANTOWN CABG DYNJ905855 KIT UNIVERSITY CABG PACK DYNJ905857 OH MED RN CDS DYNJ905936B
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of AZ, CA, FL, IL, MO, NJ, OH, OK, TN, TX, WI.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
